title: Recent Retiree - Quality Home Downsizer
clientGreeting: Hello there. We're looking to downsize now that we're retired. We want something well-maintained, secure, and ideally with good amenities. But we want to understand all our options first.
openingContext: A recently retired couple is seeking a downsized home with quality amenities and security. They are methodical and analytical.
clientResponses: We spent 40 years in our home raising our family there. Now it's just us, and we don't need the space anymore. We'd like something smaller but really nice quality.
Yes, we need to understand how the market works for this type of property. We have time, but we want to make sure we maximize what we get from our sale.
That would be helpful. We'd like to see the data and compare a few options before we make any decisions. Quality matters more than speed to us.

clientProfile.name: Patricia and Michael Grant
painPoints: Want to maximize home sale value
Need security and peace of mind

evaluationCriteria.dataProvision: Did ISA provide market analysis and valuation information?
evaluationCriteria.emotionalIntelligence: Did ISA acknowledge emotional aspect of leaving home?
evaluationCriteria.qualityEmphasized: Did ISA understand and emphasize quality over speed?
evaluationCriteria.comprehensiveApproach: Did ISA provide thorough information and analysis?
evaluationCriteria.futureOptimization: Did ISA focus on maximizing retirement outcomes?
evaluationCriteria.appointmentClosing: Did ISA secure a property viewing and consultation?
